candidate_definitions.text: DNS over HTTPS / DNS over Tor / DNSCrypt client, WireGuard proxifier, firewall, and connection tracker for Android.

A [WireGuard](https://github.com/wireguard/wireguard-go) client, an [OpenSnitch](https://github.com/evilsocket/opensnitch)-inspired firewall and network monitor + a [pi-hole](https://github.com/pi-hole/pi-hole)-inspired DNS over HTTPS, DNS over TLS, DNSCrypt client with blocklis…
